title: 清掃だって負けないんだから！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was asked to help clean up the school pool, so I
head there to find...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we're in charge of the poolside area. Let's
get to work.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, before we begin, a suggestion. How about I
just take care of the pool itself?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The whole pool? Wouldn't that be a lot to handle
by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hah, for one such as me? No way! Just leave it to
me, all right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (So... she thinks she's good at cleaning too, huh?)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (She can run, study, and clean? And I thought I was the model student!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll do all of the poolside, then! Everyone
else, please clean the diving boards and such!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (I'm definitely going to finish before her!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (Which means I can't waste time! I'll have to be thorough and efficient!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's the last of the kickboards. I should clean
the lane ropes while I'm at it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I forgot the chlorine. I should get that first.
Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Seems like Tachyon is way behind. In fact, it looks
like she's making even more of a mess...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she's thinking, but I better hurry
and finish while I have a chance!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hah, I'm done! Hehe, looks like I win with plenty
of time to spare!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Doing it quickly and efficiently worked! And it
looks like Tachyon still has a lot more to do.
Which means...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tachyon! I just finished, so I'll come help
you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Finished, are you? Same as me, then.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Same as you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, take a look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon takes a test tube from her pocket
and dumps the contents into the pool.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! All the dirt from the pool... is
floating to the surface?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's the results of my latest research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seemed promising for cleaning and disinfecting,
so I figured I could try it out as a pool cleaner.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, all I have to do is drain the water and all the
dirt will go along with it. I've also gone and
sterilized the kickboards as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, it looks like my hypothesis was correct. I'll
be leaving now.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why do I feel like I've lost?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon is truly amazing! But I'm not gonna let
this stand!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat her one of these days!
